title: Huzzah for the Eva newbies
wikitext:
[]: Huzzah for the Eva newbies!!             Quote Post by Ryo » Sat May 28, 2005 3:18 pm Yeah, so I was looking at some Eva/drooling over some Asuka pictures over at Anime Galleries when I discovered that they had a forum that was named Mecha and Apocalyptic Anime and Manga. Of course, there was Evangelion there. In I went. And the posts I read. Simple Minded people. ya`ll gotta realize the rai is shinjis mother. so there relationship is that of a mother to a son! --- clone or not yeah the feeling is alwasys gonna be there. a mother will allways care for her child. and dont go blaggin that clones dont have feelings this is quite apperent through out the show. up untill rai sacrifices herself for her son with that n2 mine.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 28, 2005 4:01 pm Often I wonder what would have happened to me, if, in my initial dazed wandering across the web for Eva information, I had not stumbled across Eva Monkey. I might have found myself lost and unsaved like these poor souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 4:03 pm Wow. I was a n00b once, but I never sucked THAT much. Don't these people know that if you know absolutely nothing about something, if you can't be bothered to learn you should say nothing at all (or at least sprinkle your words with disclaimers)?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat May 28, 2005 4:04 pm Why are there so many threads about dbz in a forum about mecha anime? Heres a few other amusing quotes i like this movie but i dont understand the part about them sharing the same feelings as the ava and what is up with Rei she barely talks and she doesnt like slap that guy when he touches her tit what is up with that

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 4:06 pm I'm almost tempted to take back what I said about the bad grammar at EMF.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 28, 2005 4:11 pm Reichu wrote: Wow. I was a n00b once, but I never sucked THAT much. Don't these people know that if you know absolutely nothing about something, if you can't be bothered to learn you should say nothing at all (or at least sprinkle your words with disclaimers)?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat May 28, 2005 4:21 pm Well this made an impression on me big enough to change my signiture! Hurray for incorrect phallic imagery!

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sat May 28, 2005 4:57 pm Defectron wrote: Well this made an impression on me big enough to change my signiture! Hurray for incorrect phallic imagery!

[]:             Quote Post by Misuzu » Sat May 28, 2005 5:17 pm i too am grateful that i found this site before i stumbled onto that other one. i would've just stabbed myself and that would've been the end of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 8:58 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Good Lord! Perhaps I'm not alone in my emotional solo bukkake theory? Although, having the view seconded in such a grammatically incorrect fashion weakens it somewhat.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat May 28, 2005 9:16 pm These n00bs are beyond my powers to guide and protect. It would be best to leave them be, and allow the smarter ones to find the real answers on their own. The one that gives them a link here gets killed by me, and their bodies will be defiled in many many horrific ways by that strange man that lives behind the local supermarket. You don't want to give them the link here because that old man is strange and you do not want him touching your corps. DD

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Sat May 28, 2005 11:03 pm That shit is so completely moronic that it makes me despise the human race for a new reason... Jesus Christ!! WTF mate!? They are so rediculous that I don't believe that these people even saw the series in the first place...

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 5:57 am Man, I though my answers where bad. Thoes guys are imbeciles. Shinji Isn't a wimp

[]:             Quote Post by Oroboro » Sun May 29, 2005 8:37 am I almost had an anuerism just reading those quotes. Went I went to the forums I felt physically ill. What the hell is wrong with people? Why can't anyone spell anymore? Shingi?! Who the hell is Shingi?! I thought it was a typo at first, then spelled it wrong again! And, "ava"? Christ! Appearently, it's an "AV filel" now! If you can't spell the names of important characters or devices from...well, ANYTHING then you shouldn't talk about it. At all. Oh this is a real gem! It hit me last night how bad this show is. Its trying to be way too much! compair this to any other show in the world and you`ll find that EVA starts of as a mecha show, then quickly changes to some fucking head trip then ends up getting lost within its self and ends up as random events linked by nothing more than the words "Its happening". it forces you to think and look for ansers to questions that nobody wanted to ask. I could forgive it if the angels ment anything but they dont. they just give you the illusion that theres somthing happening. plus not of it ever really happend under its own rules of instromentality! so i conclude with saying if im wrong about this show then you read way to deep into it and found lies that you converted into somthing that ment only something to you!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 8:40 am I know one person who can. God. Smite them now God, with all your Glory. Gabriel: God, I think an earthling wants you to smite someone. God: Who is it? Gabriel: It's......hold on. I thought you know all! God: Just tell me who the heck it is? Gabriel: Ehh, some guy called DirtyHamster. God: Not him again. Ehh, tell him I'm in a meeting or something. DirtyHamster: God. You listenin' up there...... (long pause) DirtyHamster: ......I think he's ignoreing me.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 29, 2005 11:55 am :cry: Spelling :cry: Grammar. Is it just me or is the inability to spell and use proper grammar online getting worse and worse every day. I donâ€™t ever remember it being even close to this bad during the mid to late 90â€™s.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun May 29, 2005 11:48 pm Did anyone actually type anything? I was too busy looking at the pretty pictures to tell. Oooh... pretty... :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon May 30, 2005 12:35 am Ladies und Gentlemen, welcome to the frontline of exposure. If all goes "according to plan", you're going to be surrounded by literally nations of these people.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 30, 2005 1:09 am If all goes "according to plan", you're going to be surrounded by literally nations of these people.

[]:             Quote Post by KIC » Mon May 30, 2005 2:16 pm Defectron wrote: If all goes "according to plan", you're going to be surrounded by literally nations of these people.
